message:
docs(phase2c): parity packet bundles for FP-P2D-135 through FP-P2D-171

Adds 37 parity-attestation bundle directories under artifacts/phase2c/,
one per new packet. Each bundle follows the established layout:

  parity_gate.yaml            -- gate config (strict/hardened + tags)
  parity_gate_result.json     -- gate pass/fail summary for HEAD
  parity_mismatch_corpus.json -- empty or scalar-mismatch listing
  parity_report.json          -- top-level attestation
  parity_report.decode_proof.json -- decode-round-trip proof for the packet
  parity_report.raptorq.json  -- full raptorq parity evidence blob

Coverage spans:
  FP-P2D-135 .. FP-P2D-138: reshape / pivot_table / crosstab / stack parity
  FP-P2D-139 .. FP-P2D-144: abs, reindex, duplicate-label, quantile edges
  FP-P2D-145 .. FP-P2D-150: idxmin/idxmax nonnumeric + ties + any/all utf8
  FP-P2D-151 .. FP-P2D-156: nunique edge cases + value_counts tie order
  FP-P2D-157 .. FP-P2D-171: memory_usage mixed dtypes / utf8 index,
                           trailing isnull/notnull nan/utf8 edge cases,
                           plus the final packet bundles that close out
                           the P2D-1xx tranche.

These are reproducibility artifacts (not source code); the underlying
behaviour lives in fp-frame/fp-groupby/fp-index and the conformance
fixtures committed above.

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+packet_id: FP-P2D-135
+strict:
+  critical_drift_budget: 0
+  non_critical_drift_budget_percent: 0.1
+hardened:
+  divergence_budget_percent: 1.0
+  allowlisted_divergence_categories: null
+machine_check:
+  suite: phase2c_packets
+  require_fixture_count_at_least: 4
+  require_failed: 0
